*** 2 FATAL *** EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT REPORTED THAT FLASH FLOODING RESULTED IN A SECTION OF HIGHWAY 1806 BEING WASHED OUT WHERE JOE BUSH CREEK CROSSES THE HIGHWAY. THE TIME OF THIS FLASH FLOODING IS ESTIMATED BASED ON RADAR DATA. EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT OFFICIALS FURTHER REPORTED THAT THREE TO FOUR VEHICLES WENT INTO THE WASHOUT. TWO FATALITIES HAVE BEEN CONFIRMED AS A RESULT. TIME OF THE FATALITIES IS UNKNOWN.

EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTS DAMAGE IN THE CITY OF MOTT DUE TO INTENSE THUNDERSTORM WINDS. A GARAGE DOOR WAS BLOWN IN ON THE NE SIDE OF MOTT, CAMPERS WERE BLOWN OVER ON THE EAST SIDE OF MOTT, A BUILDING ON THE FAIR GROUNDS WAS DAMAGED, AND LARGE TREES WERE BLOCKING ROADS IN THE CITY. THIS IS PRELIMINARY INFORMATION, FOLLOWUP INFORMATION WILL BE SUBMITTED WHEN RECEIVED.
